name: Liebes-Knoten (Love Knots)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well with an electric mixer.
2. Add sugar and beat again until smooth.
3. Add salt and vanilla, mixing to keep the mixture thin.
4. Gradually add flour while maintaining low speed on the mixer.
5. The mixture should now resemble cookie dough.
6. Roll out the dough very thinly on a lightly floured surface.
7. Cut into 1/2-inch strips using a knife or pastry cutter.
8. Cut each strip crosswise to measure about 1 1/2 inches long.
9. Twist each strip twice to form a bow shape.
10. Fry the knots in hot oil (375°F) until golden brown.
11. Remove from the oil and dust with sifted powdered sugar.
~ Mrs. W. G. Bench typed & posted by teri chesser 7.95
